title: Declarative API Validation — +k8s:unionMember
text:
Description:
Indicates that this field is a member of a union.
Stability Level:
Stable
Arguments:
union
(string, optional): The name of the union, if more than one exists.
memberName
(string, optional): The discriminator value for this member. Defaults to the field's name.
Usage Example:
type
MyStruct
struct
{
// +k8s:unionMember(union: "union1")
// +k8s:optional
M1
*
M1
`json:"u1m1"`
// +k8s:unionMember(union: "union1")
// +k8s:optional
M2
*
M2
`json:"u1m2"`
}
type
M1
struct
{}
type
M2
struct
{}
In this example,
M1
and
M2
are members of the named union
union1
.
